L. -33004/99 £ke <Ba*ettz of 3ndia arowirn EXTRAORDINARY HPT II—"BF^ 3—^FBn»S (ii) PART n—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) 5Hfa*H ^ SPinfifRI DITUT i c u r n B V ATrrnrttjrrv TET. 3 7 3 ] ^ ft?¥ft, #TOK, 3T^f 11, 2 0 0 5 / ^ 21, 1927 No. 373] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, APRIL 11, 2005/CHAITRA 21, 1927 ce.—a. -- —a— •^T.3n. 542(3f).—^-iO-H W*U, il'lR^cll SfftrfWT, 1955 (1955^157) l i t *1KT 7ra^t"3TT-*TnT ( 1) UTCT'51^1 *lfal*ff ["TO U 26011/2/2005-3#ft I ] ^Tf ?T*R fa??!, "Hg3?i Bf^n* 1189 GI/2005 ID -- 1 of 2 -- K ^ THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PARTII—SEC. 3(h)] MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION NewDelhi, the 11th April, 2005 S.O. 542(E).—InexerciseofthepowersconferredbySub-section(l)ofSection7BoftheCiti2enshipAct, 1955(57 of 1955), the Central Qovenunent hereby specifies the following rights to which the persons registered as Overseas Citizens of India under Section 7 A of the said Act shall be entitled, namely:— (a) grant of multiple entry lifelong visa for visiting India for any purpose; (b) exemption from registration with Foreign Regional Registration Officer or Foreign Registration Officer for any length of stay in India; and (c) parity with Non-Resident Indians in respect of all facilities available to them in economic, financial and educa- tional fields except in matters relating to the acquisition ofagricultural or plantation properties. rF.No. 26011/2/2005-ICI] DURGASHANKERMISHRA, Jt.
